allow: Bash(for f in src/sections/CoffeeSection.tsx src/sections/SweetsSection.tsx src/sections/BrunchSection.tsx src/sections/EventsSection.tsx src/sections/AboutSection.tsx src/sections/VisitSection.tsx)

Bash(do sed -i 's/className=""card-editorial absolute w-\\[92vw\\] md:w-\\[86vw\\] h-\\[72vh\\] md:h-\\[78vh\\] left-1\\/2 top-1\\/2 -translate-x-1\\/2 -translate-y-1\\/2""/className=""card-editorial w-[92vw] md:w-[86vw] h-[72vh] md:h-[78vh] relative flex-shrink-0""/g' "$f")
